inclusions.description: The documentation will be prepared before crossing the border. The port of entry must be Port Huron

🚐 Urgent Relocation Adventures – Help Us Move Our Fleet! 🌏
Ready for a spontaneous road trip? Adventure Rentals needs help relocating vehicles between our depots — and you get a special discounted rate for the ride!

Enjoy the open road and stunning scenery while following our simple sealed-highway route (we’ll provide a travel map to guide your journey). It’s the perfect mix of adventure and purpose — your drive helps us keep our fleet moving!
Please note: Relocation hires are subject to special Terms & Conditions, which must be accepted before departure. These include adhering to sealed roads only and following the provided route.
Limited vehicles available — book now and make your next adventure count!
**Standard & Special Adventure Rentals Terms & Conditions apply. **
Admin fee, linen, camping table and chairs, cooking equipment, portable solar shower etc. Toll roads included
Full Insurance included in Daily rate. $750 bond/excess required.

Damage to the left rear sliding door.

Returning conditions:

✅ Full diesel tank
✅ Full water tank
✅ Waste water empty
✅ Exterior and interior cleaning

We are Mr.Vancamper, a campervan rental company in Portugal with locations in Lisbon and Faro.

The Volkswagen California Coast® is the perfect choice for anyone looking for comfort, practicality and luxury all in one trip. Compact, agile, and fully equipped, this campervan turns any destination into a memorable experience.

With an automatic transmission, it offers a smoother and more comfortable ride, even for the driver. You can also enjoy an integrated sound, navigation, and media system, easily connected to your phone via Bluetooth on the center console.

Upon arriving at your destination, the California transforms into a true home on wheels—spacious and thoughtfully designed down to the last detail, where every space is crafted to ensure total mobility and premium comfort. With a pop-up roof that includes a bed, complemented by fold-down seats that also convert into a bed, where up to 4 adults can rest in complete comfort.

✅What's included in the rental price?

BASIC Protection Plan
🍽️ Kitchen kit
🏕️ Camping kit
🧼 Cleaning kit
🧰 First aid kit
2 gas cylinders of 6,0kg each
Electronic tolls device (ViaVerde)
AdBlue
Ferry Reimbursement for the vehicle and driver subject to receipts. Refunded once the vehicle has been successfully delivered. Do not book the ferry until your booking request is confirmed.
USD100 Cleaning Fee - USD100 Tolls Fee
